_comment: Sanctioned English-output changes per phase. diff-dist significant-CHANGED among English files MUST be a subset of these URLs, and the delta MUST match allowed_change (verified by eyeballing the HTML diff). Anything else = regression.

phase-2-es-pilot.allowed_change: Added <link rel="alternate" hreflang="es" ...> in <head> (via BaseLayout alternates prop). No change to <title>, canonical, x-default, content, or body.
